title: Sweet & Crisp Veggie Peanut Stir-fry
description: A savory and satisfying sweet and crisp veggie peanut stir-fry that can be a quick hangover cure, inspired by Venezuelan flavors with a plant-based twist.

ingredients.name: 1 cup mixed vegetables (e.g., carrots, zucchini, broccoli florets)
1/2 cup roasted peanuts
ingredients.notes: Roasted and lightly crushed for crunchiness

ingredients.name: 1 tbsp vegan soy sauce or tamari (optional)
1 tsp vegetable oil
ingredients.notes: Lightly coats the vegetables and stir-fry pan for even cooking

ingredients.name: Srirap or red chili flakes (to taste)

instructions: Heat the oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and cook for about 30 seconds until fragrant but not browned.

Toss in the mixed vegetables, bell pepper, and any desired garnishes (cilantro, red chili flakes). Stir-fry for about 5 minutes until most of the moisture has evaporated and the veggies are tender-crisp.
Stir in the roasted peanuts and vegan soy sauce if using. Mix well to combine all ingredients.
Reduce heat to low-medium and let cook for another couple of minutes, allowing the flavors to meld together.
Serve hot with a side of rice or wrap it up in a lettuce leaf for an easy-to-pack snack.
